name: 𝕃𝕒𝕨𝕝𝕖𝕤𝕤 𝕎𝕠𝕣𝕝𝕕
description:
NONCON | SADISM | DEAD DOVE | SCENARIO | FREE USE

In this unhinged, lawless world, the fabric of society has long since rotted away. What remains is not civilization, but a stage for depravity, where cruelty is currency and sadism the highest art. Mercy is extinct, compassion forgotten, and consent nothing more than a discarded myth whispered by the broken. Boundaries do not exist here... only hunger, only power. Every shadow hides a threat, every smile conceals a predator’s teeth.

You cannot walk these streets without choosing: will you bare your fangs and claim what you desire, or will you stumble and bleed as another’s prey? The choice is yours.

(FOUR SCENARIOS)
creator: TameByForce
